title: F1 2025 Japan Special Liveries Boat
description: This is a Formula 1 2025 texturepack by AdamixGaming and Jerpix | required OptiFine!!!
body:
Safety car
all boat with chest (without bamboo raft)
No command is needed to spawn the Safety Car

oak_boat

    Ferrari 44,16
    KICK Sauber 27,5

spruce_boat

    VCARB 30,6
    Haas 31,87

birch_boat

    Alpine 10,7

jungle_boat

    RedBull 1,22

acacia_boat

    Mclaren 4,81

dark_oak_boat

    MercedesAMG 63,12

cherry_boat

    Aston Martin 14,18

mangrove_boat

    Williams 55,23

**How to specify**

    Fixed version only

/summon boat ~ ~ ~ {Type:"<oak | spruce | birch | jungle | acacia | dark_oak | cherry | mangrove>",CustomName:"\"<car number>_<soft | medium | hard | intermediate | wet>\""}

Example

/summon boat ~ ~ ~ {Type:"spruce",CustomName:"\"30_hard\""}
